title: Draper 4-Way Wheel Nut Removal Wrench | Wheel Cross Brace 17mm/19mm/21mm/22mm | Automotive Mechanics Hand Tools | 36005, Blue
description: Heavy-duty forged four way wheel nut wrench 17 x 19 x 21 x 22 mm. Enamelled finish for corrosion protection. Arm length: 380 mm. All Draper tools are manufactured to high quality standards that are strictly controlled by our quality control engineers.
